Title: DB.DBA.SPARQL_RDB2RDF_LIST_TABLES
Description: Returns a vector of names of tables that are used as sources for Linked Data Views.

Returns a vector of names of tables that are used as sources for Linked Data Views. Application
    	developer should decide what to do with each of them - create triggers or do some
    	application-specific workarounds.

Note that if some SQL views are used as sources for Linked Data Views and these views does not
    	have INSTEAD triggers then workarounds become mandatory for them, not just a choice, because
    	BEFORE or AFTER triggers on views are not allowed if there is no appropriate INSTEAD trigger.
    	The mode argument should be zero in current version.
